zh.lifeSummary: 當Joshua Allen Griffith於1833年12月3日出生在美國喬治亞時，他的父親John Allen Griffith34歲，母親Nancy Young34歲。他於1853年7月15日與Mary Ann Bailey在美國阿拉巴馬州馬歇爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他於1870年住在美國阿肯色州蘭多夫洛亞諾可 堂史普且於1880年住在美國阿肯色州蘭多夫真斯 可可 堂史普。他去世於1879年9月26日在美國阿肯色州蘭多夫享年45歲，埋葬在美國阿肯色州勞倫斯拉文登 斯普林斯真斯 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joshua Allen Griffith于1833年12月3日出生在美国乔治亚州时，他的父亲John Allen Griffith34岁，母亲Nancy Young34岁。他于1853年7月15日与Mary Ann Bailey在美国亚拉巴马州馬歇爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他于1870年住在美国阿肯色州蘭多夫洛亞諾可 堂史普且于1880年住在美国阿肯色州蘭多夫真斯 可可 堂史普。他去世于1879年9月26日在美国阿肯色州蘭多夫享年45岁，埋葬在美国阿肯色州勞倫斯拉文登 斯普林斯真斯 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Griffith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

variants.name: Griff
meanings: English: topographic name for someone living near a pit or hollow, from Middle English grif ‘pit, hollow, narrow valley’ (Old Norse gryfja), or a habitational name from Griff in Warwickshire, Griffe in Derbyshire, or Griff Farm in Rievaulx, North Yorkshire, all probably named with this word.
Welsh and English: from the Welsh personal name Gryff, a short form of Gruffudd. See Griffith .

variants.name: Kerfoot
meanings: habitational name, probably from Carefoot, near Myerscough (Lancashire).

variants.name: Griffiths
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan and western England): Anglicized form of the patronymic (ap) Gruffudd, from Old Welsh Grippiud (see Griffith ).

nameMeanings.name: Joshua
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Meaning ‘God is salvation’ in Hebrew; it is borne in the Bible by the Israelite leader who took command of the Children of Israel after the death of Moses and led them, after many battles, to take possession of the Promised Land. The name, long favoured by Jews and Nonconformist Christians, enjoyed a great surge in popularity in the 1990s. Well-known bearers of the name include the American pianist and conductor  Joshua Rifkin  (  b. 1944 ) and the American-born violinist  Joshua Bell  (  b. 1967 ).

nameMeanings.name: Allen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alan  , in Britain generally found only as a surname, but in North America equally common as a given name.

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries - 1835: Randolph, Arkansas Territory, United States; 1836: Randolph, Arkansas, United States

historicEvents.title: Remember the Alamo
historicEvents.description: Being a monumental event in the Texas Revolution, The Battle of the Alamo was a thirteen-day battle at the Alamo Mission near San Antonio. In the early morning of the final battle, the Mexican Army advanced on the Alamo. Quickly being overrun, the Texian Soldiers quickly withdrew inside the building. The battle has often been overshadowed by events from the Mexican–American War, But the Alamo gradually became known as a national battle site and later named an official Texas State Shrine.
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.
Historical Boundaries: 1850: Gordon, Georgia, United States

Civil War History - Some 11,000 Georgians gave their lives in defense of their state a state that suffered immense destruction. But wars end brought about an even more dramatic figure to tell: 460,000 African-Americans were set free from the shackles of slavery to begin new lives as free people.
Abraham Lincoln issues Emancipation Proclamation, declaring slaves in Confederate states to be free.

historicEvents.title: The Fifteenth Amendment
historicEvents.description: Prohibits the federal government and each state from denying a citizen the right to vote based on that citizen's race, color, or previous condition of servitude. It was the last of the Reconstruction Amendments.

historicEvents.title: Giving all the right to vote
historicEvents.description: The Act was an extension of the Fifteenth Amendment, that prohibited discrimination by state offices in voter registration. It also helped empower the President with the authority to enforce the first section of the Fifteenth Amendment throughout the United States. Being the first of three Enforcement Acts passed by the Congress, it helped combat attacks on the suffrage rights of African Americans.

en.lifeSummary: When Joshua Allen Griffith was born on 3 December 1833, in Georgia, United States, his father, John Allen Griffith, was 34 and his mother, Nancy Young, was 34. He married Mary Ann Bailey on 15 July 1853, in Marshall, Alabama, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He lived in Roanoke Township, Randolph, Arkansas, United States in 1870 and Janes Creek Township, Randolph, Arkansas, United States in 1880. He died on 26 September 1879, in Randolph, Arkansas, United States, at the age of 45, and was buried in Janes Cemetery, Ravenden Springs, Lawrence, Arkansas, United States.

Il a épousé Mary Ann Bailey le 15 juillet 1853, à Marshall, Alabama, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il a vécu à Roanoke Township, Randolph, Arkansas, États-Unis en 1870 et à Janes Creek Township, Randolph, Arkansas, États-Unis en 1880. Il est décédé le 26 septembre 1879, à Randolph, Arkansas, États-Unis, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Janes Cemetery, Ravenden Springs, Lawrence, Arkansas, États-Unis.

ja.lifeSummary: Joshua Allen Griffithが1833年12月3日にアメリカ合衆国ジョージア州で生まれた時，父John Allen Griffithは34歳，母Nancy Youngは34歳であった。1853年7月15日にアメリカ合衆国アラバマ州マーシャルでMary Ann Baileyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1870年にはアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ランドルフロアノク トウンシュイップに，1880年にはアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ランドルフジャンス クレエク トウンシュイップに住んでいた。彼は1879年9月26日にアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ランドルフで45歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ラウレンスラベンデン スプリングズジャンス セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joshua Allen Griffith(이)가 1833년 12월 3일 미국 조지아 주에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Allen Griffith(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Nancy Young(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1853년 7월 15일 미국 앨라배마 주 마샤에서 Mary Ann Bailey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 1870년도에 미국 아칸소 주 랜돌프 로노크 타운시프에서, 1880년도에 미국 아칸소 주 랜돌프 제네스 크리크 타운시프에서 살았다. 그는 1879년 9월 26일 미국 아칸소 주 랜돌프에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 아칸소 주 로렌스 레이븐든 스프링스 제네스 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.3 December 1833–26 September 1879: 3 de dezembro de 1833–26 de setembro de 1879
pt.Benton Township, Fulton, Arkansas, Unite: Benton Township, Fulton, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América
pt.Ravenden Springs, Randolph, Arkansas, Un: Ravenden Springs, Lawrence, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América

pt.Janes Cemetery, Ravenden Springs, Randol: Janes Cemetery, Ravenden Springs, Lawrence, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América
pt.Gordon county, Gordon, Georgia, United S: Gordon, Geórgia, Estados Unidos da América
pt.Marshall, Alabama, United States: Marshall, Alabama, Estados Unidos da América
pt.Randolph, Arkansas, United States: Randolph, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joshua Allen Griffith nasceu em 3 de dezembro de 1833, em Geórgia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, John Allen Griffith, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Nancy Young, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Ann Bailey em 15 de julho de 1853, em Marshall, Alabama, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele viveu em Roanoke Township, Randolph, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América em 1870 e em Janes Creek Township, Randolph, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América em 1880. Ele faleceu em 26 de setembro de 1879, em Randolph, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Janes Cemetery, Ravenden Springs, Lawrence, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joshua Allen Griffith родился 3 декабря 1833 г. в местности Джорджия, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени John Allen Griffith было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Nancy Young, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Ann Bailey 15 июля 1853 г. в местности маршолл, Алабама, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он жил в местности роанок тоуншип, рандолф, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в 1870 году и в местности дженесь крик тоуншип, рандолф, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в 1880 году. Он умер 26 сентября 1879 г. в местности рандолф, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности дженесь кеметири, равенден спрингс, ларенс, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joshua Allen Griffith nació el 3 de diciembre de 1833, en Georgia, Estados Unidos, su papá, John Allen Griffith, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Nancy Young, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Mary Ann Bailey el 15 de julio de 1853, en Marshall, Alabama, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Vivió en Roanoke Township, Randolph, Arkansas, Estados Unidos en 1870 y en Janes Creek Township, Randolph, Arkansas, Estados Unidos en 1880. Murió el 26 de septiembre de 1879, en Randolph, Arkansas, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Janes Cemetery, Ravenden Springs, Lawrence, Arkansas, Estados Unidos.
